meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve slow development speed (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome slow development speed. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Setup for Freelancers: Beat Slow Development
content.seo_description: Master Claude Code skills to eliminate slow development cycles. This advanced checklist helps freelancers ship production-ready apps faster using Antigravity.
content.answer_block: To eliminate slow development, integrate Claude Code with your existing stack to automate boilerplate and architectural scaffolding. By leveraging custom Antigravity prompts for context-aware code generation, you reduce manual context switching, enforce strict design patterns, and accelerate your delivery pipeline, enabling you to ship client-ready SaaS features in hours, not weeks.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking on your sprint, but your codebase feels like it is moving through molasses. Every manual refactor and boilerplate setup is a tax on your profitability, draining the energy you need for high-level architecture. You are not just fighting bugs; you are fighting the friction of traditional development workflows that were never designed for the speed of modern AI-assisted engineering.

Relief is here. By mastering the synergy between Claude Code and Antigravity, you transform your terminal into a high-octane engine of production. This isn't just about writing code faster; it is about offloading the cognitive load of syntax and structure, allowing you to operate as a force-multiplier for your clients. Welcome to the new standard of freelance agility.

steps.title: Environment Scoping & Context Injection
steps.description: Establish the project boundaries to ensure Claude Code understands your specific architectural constraints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current directory structure and identify the primary architectural pattern. Create a JSON schema representing our core data entities.

steps.title: Automated Boilerplate Generation
steps.description: Use AI to scaffold standard API routes and database models to avoid manual repetition.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a RESTful CRUD implementation for our 'User' entity using the established project naming conventions.

steps.title: Refactor & Optimization Loop
steps.description: Identify bottlenecks in your existing codebase and let Claude suggest efficient refactors.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current authentication middleware. Suggest three refactors to improve latency and security compliance.

steps.title: Test-Driven Development (TDD) Automation
steps.description: Generate comprehensive unit tests immediately after feature implementation to ensure stability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create Jest test suites for the newly generated service layer, ensuring 90% branch coverage.

steps.title: CI/CD Pipeline Integration
steps.description: Configure your deployment scripts to automatically validate code quality before pushing to production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a GitHub Actions YAML file that runs linting, type-checking, and our new unit tests on every pull request.

pro_tips: Always maintain a .clauderules file in your root to force the model to adhere to your specific coding style guide.
Use Claude Code's 'memory' feature to store client-specific business logic, preventing the model from forgetting project-specific constraints.
Chain your Antigravity prompts: feed the output of your architecture analysis directly into your feature implementation prompts for perfect alignment.
Alias your most complex Claude Code commands in your .zshrc to reduce command-line friction during deep work sessions.
When facing a complex bug, use the --debug flag to inspect the model's reasoning path before it commits changes to your workspace.
content.next_steps: Begin by auditing your current project for high-frequency repetitive tasks, then automate them using the steps above to gain immediate time back in your workflow.
content.conversion_block: Stop building the hard way and start scaling your freelance business with AI-powered velocity. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
